title: DCP Reference
description: A semantic link from an Event or entity to a related entity or external resource. The 'rel' vocabulary is CLOSED and contains project-relation semantics only; it never carries routing, delivery, or permission meaning. 'ref' is an opaque descriptive pointer: consumers MUST NOT automatically resolve it as a network address (SSRF risk).

rel.description: Closed semantic project-relation vocabulary. Routing/permission verbs (e.g. routes_to, approved_by, delivered_via, assigned_to) are intentionally excluded and MUST NOT appear here.

ref.description: Opaque descriptive pointer (a DCP id or an external reference string). Untrusted; MUST NOT be auto-dereferenced as a URL/network address.
